verses.text: Ezra in tu-a bangin thu ngenin mawhna pulakin khitui naptui tawh Pasian' biakinn mai-ah kunin a om laitakin Israel mi numei, pasal, naupang, mi tampi tak ama kiimah hong kikhawmin amaute khempeuh zong nakpi takin a kap uh hi

Tua ciangin Elam-te beh sung panin Jehiel' tapa Shekaniah hong pau-in Ezra kiangah, “Hih gama teng gamdang numeite ten'pihna tawh i Pasian tungah i khial hi. Ahi ta zongin Israel mite-a' dingin lametna omlai hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, ka topa uh nangma ngaihsutna leh i Pasian' thupiakna a kihta mite' ngaihsutna bangin hih i zite leh a tate uh i makna ding thu i Pasian' tungah kiciam ni. Tua ciangin thukham sunga om bangin gamta ni
Kipan in; nangma nasep ding ahi hi; kote in kong huh ding uh hi. Hang in la sem in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Ezra dingin, a kigensa bangin amaute a gamtatna dingun a kiciam dingin siampi makaite, Levi mite, leh Israel mi khempeuh sawl a, amaute zong a kiciam pah uh hi

Tua ciangin Pasian' biakinn panin Ezra paikhia-in Eliashib' tapa Jehohanan' omna inndei-ah pai-in tua lai-ah a giak hi. Salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik mite' khialhna hangin dah ahih manin amah in an leh tui ne zolo hi
Tua ciangin Judah leh Jerusalem sunga a om a hong ciahkik salte khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a hong kikhopna ding uh
leh ni thum sungin a hong tunglo a om leh uliante leh upate' hoihsakna bangin a neihsa khempeuh uh kimanin, salsuaksa mihonte panin a kihawlkhiat theihna ding thu taangkona khat kibawl hi

Tua ahih ciangin Judah leh Benjamin mi khempeuh ni thum sungin Jerusalem-ah hong kikhawm uh a, tua pen a kha kuana a ni sawmnih ni ahi hi. Tua hi a, Pasian' biakinn mai inntualah hih thu hangin mi khempeuh patau-in guah lakah lingin a tu uh hi
Tua ciangin siampi Ezra dingto-in amaute kiangah, “Note in gamdang numeite zi-in la-in Israel mite' mawhna na behlap uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa' tungah na mawhna uh pulak un la, ama deihna bangin gamta-in hih gama teng gamdang mite leh gamdang mi ahi na zite uh tawh kikhenin tuam om un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a kikhawm mi khempeuh in dawngin kiko uh a, “Hi ta hen, na gen bangin ka gamta ding uh hi

Ahi zongin mi tampi hi hang a, guahzuk laitak zong ahi hi. Hih guah lakah ka omsuak zo kei ding uh hi. Tua thamloin hih thu-ah eite in mawhna lianpi hihkha ihih manin ni khat ni nih sungin hih nasep a kizo thei ding hilo hi

A kikhawm mihonpite' tangin i makaite semsak in la, hih thu hangin eite' tungah Pasian' hehna a dam matengin, i khuapite sung khempeuhah gamdang numei a ten'pih mi khempeuh amau khuasung upate leh thukhente ciat tawh a kiseh hunin i makaite kiangah va kilak uh hen,” a ci uh hi
Asahel' tapa Jonathan leh Tikvah' tapa Jahzeiah-te gel bek in hih thu nial uh a, Meshullam leh Levi mi Shabbethai bek in tua a nialte pan'pih uh hi

Tua hi a, thukham omsa bangin, a hong ciahkik salsuakte a gamta uh hi. Siampi Ezra in amau' beh ciat tangin beh lutang pawlkhat tengkhia a, tuate khempeuh a minin a kilokhia ahi hi. A kha sawmna a ni khat ni-in hih mite a thukan ding uh kipan uh a
a kha masa a ni khat ni-in gamdang numei a ten'pih mite' thu a kan uh a zo uh hi
Siampite beh lak panin Jozadak' tapa Jeshua leh a sanggamte beh sung panin Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib, leh Gedaliah-te in gamdang numei a ten'pihna kimu hi
Amaute in a zite a mak ding uh kiciam uh a, amau' mawhna hangin biakna-in tuuhon panin tuutal khat hong paipih uh hi
Immer-te beh sung panin Hanani leh Zebadiah ahi uh hi
Harim-te beh sung panin Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel, leh Uzziah ahi uh hi
Pashhur-te beh sung panin Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad leh Elasah ahi uh hi
Levi mite sung panin Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (Kelita a kici), Pethahiah, Judah, leh Eliezer ahi uh hi
Lasate sung panin Eliashib ahi hi. Kongcingte sung panin Shallum, Telem, leh Uri ahi uh hi
Israel mi adangte sung pan: Parosh-te beh panin Ramiah, Izziah, Malkhijah, Mijamin, Eleazar, Makhijah, leh Beinaiah ahi uh hi
Elam-te beh panin Mattaniah, Zekhariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth, leh Elijah ahi uh hi
Zattu-te beh panin Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad, leh Aziza ahi uh hi
Bebai-te beh panin Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, leh Athlai ahi uh hi
Bani-te beh panin Meshulam, Maluk, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal, leh Jeremoth ahi uh hi
Pahathmoab-te beh panin Adna, Khelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui, leh Manasseh ahi uh hi
Harim-te beh sung panin Eliezer, Isshijah, Malkhijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon
Benjamin, Maluk, leh Shemariah ahi uh hi
Hashum-te beh sung panin Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Elifelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, leh Shimei ahi uh hi
Bani-te beh panin Maadai, Amram, Uel
Benaiah, Bedeiah, Kheluhi
Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib
Mattaniah, Mattenai, leh Jaasu ahi uh hi
Binnui-te beh panin Shimei
Shelemiah, Nathan, Adaiah
Maknadebai, Shashai, Sharai
Azarel, Shelemiah, Shemariah
Shalum, Amariah, leh Josef ahi uh hi
Nebo-te beh panin Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel, leh Benaiah ahi uh hi
Hih mite khempeuh in gamdang numei ten'pih uh a, amaute in a zite uh a tate uh tawh a makhawm uh hi.
